subject: Project Management
title: The Future of Quality
description: A quick, practical guide to The Future of Quality.

hook.text: AI can now detect defects faster than humans — inspecting thousands of products per second.

buildup.text: Machine learning predicts quality failures before they happen by analyzing sensor data in real time.

discovery.text: Digital twins — virtual replicas of factories — let engineers test process changes before making them.

twist.text: But technology alone can't create a quality culture. The human commitment to continuous improvement remains essential.

climax.text: The future of quality combines AI's speed with lean's philosophy: technology plus culture.

punchline.text: Machines find the defects. Humans build the culture.

quiz.question: What role will AI play in the future of quality?
options: Detecting defects and predicting failures faster than humans
Replacing the need for quality culture
